content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于3月20日16:30(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年4月3日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、活动
【角色活动：莫丝】
● 玩法活动「默斯克斯的呼唤」结束时间延后 14 天至 4 月 6 日 9:00。相应地，意识潜游「沉溺」免费解锁截止时间也延后至 4 月 6 日 9:00。 
● 除非特别说明，后续角色玩法活动将与对应角色活动唤醒同步开放与结束。
 
【角色活动复刻：图鲁】
● 在 4 月 6 日 9:00 至 5 月 4 日 9:00 期间，以下活动限时开放！
    ○ 角色活动唤醒「三相衡生」可在以下角色活动唤醒中任意切换：
        ■ 「正位之刻」：深海界域伤害型唤醒体「图鲁」。
        ■ 「高杯盛筵」：血肉界域伤害型唤醒体「索蕾尔」。
        ■ 「绝对先知」：混沌界域辅助型唤醒体「熔毁·朵尔」。
        ■ 以上唤醒体的试玩活动「聚灵演练」同步开放：可获取「银芯」×120、「流明之芯」×3。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒「因果苗圃」可在以下命轮活动唤醒中任意切换：
        ■ 「暗海迷声」：命轮「神王的颂歌」。
        ■ 「欲血横流」：命轮「以蔷薇之名」。
        ■ 「虚无投影」：命轮「坠入虚无的人偶」。
    ○ 玩法活动「神王复苏」限时开放！
        ■ 攻略活动可获得限定 SR 命轮「青石王座」与限定头像「以银钥之名：图鲁」。
        ■ 共计可获取「银芯」×600、「流明之芯」×5、「无垢之芯」×5、「贤石碎屑」×235、「群星余梦」×25、「碎裂余梦」×50、「拟态凝晶」×300，并且可以无限量兑换「蔷薇金券」。
        ■ 拥有唤醒体「图鲁」、命轮「神王的颂歌」与「青石王座」可大幅提高活动攻略效率！
        ■ 活动期间意识潜游「加冕之日」无需「现实起点」即可解锁！
 
【学园活动：第 31 期】
● 在 4 月 6 日 9:00 至 4 月 20 日 9:00 期间，以下学园活动限时开放！
    ○ 「学园礼赠」：活动期间累计登录 7 天即可获得「流明之芯」×10 的丰厚奖励！累计登录至多 14 天可获得其他奖励！
    ○ 「课题纪录」：
        ■ 学期限定头像：「永不褪色的昨天：图鲁」、「永不褪色的昨天：墨菲」、「永不褪色的昨天：奥吉尔」、「弥萨格幕间剧：朵尔」、「弥萨格幕间剧：诺缔拉」、「典藏邮票：萨尔瓦多」。
        ■ 本期课题持续时间较短，因此获得课题经验翻倍，直接激活与升级核心课题所需源液也会有所下调。
    ○ 「钩吻葬盛」赛季限定对战表情：「莱克·侦查」、「卡茜亚·聆听」、「拉蒙娜·图书馆使用」、「朵尔·违禁品检查」。
 
二、综合
【唤醒】
● 「每 5 次唤醒最多获取 2 次 SSR 物品」限制移除：
    ○ 在角色活动唤醒、命轮活动唤醒、「界域研习」、「轮转之书」、「晦夜引灯」、「千幕游记」等 SSR 基础出率标注为 3.03% 的唤醒中，移除了「每 5 次唤醒最多获取 2 次 SSR 物品」规则限制。
    ○ 含保底综合出率相应调整：
        ■ SSR 物品：从 5.00% 略微上调为 5.02%。
        ■ SR 物品：维持 25.00% 不变。
        ■ R 物品：从 70.00% 略微下调为 69.98%。
    ○ 个别具体的 SSR 物品标注的含保底综合出率可能会有 0.01% 左右的略微提升。
    ○ 分享展示：唤醒 5 次时若获得 3 个或以上 SSR 物品，唤醒分享图片将仅展示其中 2 个 SSR 物品。
    ○ 补偿规则：对于本次更新前在相应唤醒中进行了唤醒的守密人，将按每次唤醒补偿「银芯」×1 的规则以邮件形式补发；由于数据处理量较大，补偿将在完成相关确认工作后尽快发放。
 
【典藏馆】
● 「影像-活动」中的「神王复苏」背景动画得到了调整，现在背景动画与活动故事更加契合。
 
三、问题修复
【战斗】
● 修复了唤醒体「莫丝」天赋「永黯之地」的描述中，缺少「神国·深海」界域说明的问题。
● 修复了玩法活动「默斯克斯的呼唤」中，造物「小煤球二世」在第五回合进入超维回合时，会错误地额外获得第二张「二世冲击！」的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇造物「彩蛋时间」在当前狂气低于基础狂气的某些情况下未能触发获得狂气效果的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「泰旖丝」狂气爆发「丰穰之仪」吞噬「圣洁之子」后的获得狂气提示错误地只展示了一次的问题。
● 修复了玩法活动「疾驰的欢愉专列」中，在战斗失败时可能会出现卡死的问题。
 
【活动】
● 修复了玩法活动「相位逆转」中，此前已经获得头像「逆转回合：万象牌」的守密人再次获取该头像时，未能转换为「无形者的请柬」的问题。对受影响的守密人，我们深表歉意，并将尽快以邮件形式补发相应的「无形者的请柬」。
● 修复了玩法活动「默斯克斯的呼唤」的「莫丝的宝库」规则说明中，物品名称和数量的描述格式未被统一为「「物品名称」×数量」的问题。
● 修复了「邀请活动」中查看「邀请列表」时，已邀请的守密人信息显示错误，以及奖励的「银钥辉光」错误地显示为白色图标的问题。
 
【兼容性】
● 修复了在「登录」中点击「进入游戏」后，某些情况下会出现登录失败并且「进入游戏」按钮消失，无法重新登录的问题。
● 修复了使用 iOS 设备游玩时，某些情况下会出现卡死、闪退的问题。
● 修复了使用 PC 游玩时，若守密人后手，在对手的回合按键切换卡牌展示会错误地查看到对方手牌信息的问题。
 
四、本地化
【英语】
● 修复了在英语语言设置下，部分唤醒体技能和造物效果描述，以及部分剧情文本拼写错误的问题。
 
【日语】
● 修复了在日语语言设置下，部分唤醒体技能描述与最新效果不符，以及数值显示错误的问题。
● 修复了在日语语言设置下，唤醒体「徐」、「莫丝」、「茉夏」的名字在部分界面显示错误的问题。
● 感谢志愿翻译者 Alza 的日语翻译优化工作！得益于此，在本次更新中，「调查行动」星辰篇第一章、「特遣纪录：血的颜色」、「特遣纪录：玫瑰的栖居」、「异梦视界：天边之外·上」的剧情，以及「技能」、「物资」、「造物」、「关卡」、「共鸣」、「活动」、「唤醒体」等多个功能中，共计 2436 行文本的日语翻译得到了优化。
 
【韩语】
● 感谢志愿翻译者 BlackCatNero、LavenderJuly 的韩语翻译优化工作！得益于此，在本次更新中，「调查行动」各章节和「特遣纪录」、「意识潜游」、「异梦世界」、「多维连接」的各篇章剧情，以及「技能」、「物资」、「手册」等多个功能中，共计 5047 行文本的韩语翻译得到了优化。

**V2.4.3.3 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on March 20 at 16:30(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
  
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on April 3, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
  
[Update Content]
1. Event
[Character Event: Vortice]
● The "Call of the Moskstraumen" event end time has been pushed back 14 days to April 6 at 9:00. Accordingly, the deadline to unlock Psyche Deepdive "No More the Shore" for free has also been pushed back to April 6 at 9:00 
● Unless otherwise specified, subsequent character gameplay events will open and close in sync with the corresponding Character Event Awakening.

[Character Event Rerun: Tulu]
● From April 6 at 9:00 to May 4 at 9:00, the following events are available for a limited time
    ○ Character Event Awakening "Triune Verdant" can be freely switched between the following Character Event Awakenings:
        ■ "When Stars Align": Aequor Realm Assault Awakener "Tulu".
        ■ "Sumptuous Banquet": Caro Realm Assault Awakener "Sorel".
        ■ "Absolute Prophet": Chaos Realm Chorus Awakener "Doll: Inferno".
        ■ The Trial Event "Team Trial" for the above Awakeners is now open simultaneously: you can obtain "Silver" ×120 and "Luminous Core" ×3.
    ○ WoD Event Awakening "Sylvan Omen" can be freely switched between the following WoD Event Awakenings:
        ■ "Dark Sea Whispers": Wheel of Destiny "Hymn of the Sovereign".
        ■ "Crimson Deluge": Wheel of Destiny "By Rose Alone".
        ■ "Void Projection": Wheel of Destiny "Manikin of Oblivion".
    ○ Limited-Time Event "The Sovereign's Return" Now Available
        ■ Participate in the event to obtain the limited SR Wheel of Destiny "Blue Stone Throne" and the limited avatar "By the Silver Key: Tulu".
        ■ A total of "Silver" ×600, "Luminous Core" ×5, "Pure Core" ×5, "Aetheric Shard" ×235, "Dreamspark" ×25, "Dreamshard" ×50, "Mimetic Crystal" ×300 can be obtained, and "Rose Scrip" can be exchanged in unlimited quantities.
        ■ Having Awakener "Tulu", Wheel of Destiny "Hymn of the Sovereign", and "Blue Stone Throne" can greatly improve your event progression efficiency
        ■ During the event, Psyche Deepdive "Day of Coronation" can be unlocked without "Reality Verge"

[Mythag Events: Issue 31]
● From April 6 at 9:00 AM to April 20 at 9:00 AM, the following Mythag Events will be available for a limited time
    ○ "Gifts from Mythag": Log in for a total of 7 days during the event to claim a generous reward of "Luminous Core" ×10! Other rewards can be obtained through up to 14 cumulative logins
    ○ "Curriculum":
        ■ Semester Exclusive Avatars: "Unfading Yesterday: Tulu", "Unfading Yesterday: Murphy", "Unfading Yesterday: Ogier", "Mythag Interlude: Doll", "Mythag Interlude: Nautila", "Collector's Stamp: Salvador".
        ■ This Topic season is shorter than usual, so Topic EXP earned is doubled, and the Silver Prime required to directly activate and upgrade Premium Topics will also be reduced.
    ○ "With Spikenard and Myrrh" season-exclusive Traphase Emotes: "Ryker·Reconnaissance", "Casiah·Listening", "Ramona·Library Use", "Doll·Contraband Inspection".

2. Summary
[Awaken]
● "Every 5 Awakens, max 2 SSR items" restriction removed:
    ○ In Character Event Awakening, WoD Event Awakening, "Realms Research," "Book of Rotation," "Moonless Guide," "Kaleido Recollections," and other Awakenings with a base SSR rate of 3.03%, the rule "obtain at most 2 SSR items every 5 Awakens" has been removed.
    ○ Guaranteed Comprehensive Drop Rate adjusted accordingly:
        ■ SSR Items: Slightly increased from 5.00% to 5.02%.
        ■ SR Items: Maintained at 25.00% unchanged.
        ■ R Item: Slightly decreased from 70.00% to 69.98%.
    ○ The guaranteed comprehensive drop rate marked on individual specific SSR items may have a slight increase of around 0.01%.
    ○ Share Display: When 3 or more SSR items are obtained in 5 Awakens, the Awakening share image will only display 2 of the SSR items.
    ○ Compensation Rules: For Keepers who performed Awakenings in the corresponding Awakening prior to this update, compensation of Silver ×1 per Awakening will be issued via mail; due to the large volume of data processing, compensation will be distributed as soon as possible after the relevant verification is completed.

[Archive]
● The background animation for "The Sovereign's Return" in "Visuals - Event" has been adjusted and now better complements the event story.

3. Problem Fix
[Battle]
● Fixed an issue where the description of Awakener "Vortice"'s Talent "Lightless Bottom" was missing the "Divine Realm: Aequor" Realm explanation.
● Fixed an issue in the gameplay event "Call of the Moskstraumen" where the Relic "Coalsie II" would incorrectly gain a second "Coalsie SMACK!" when entering the Ultra Round on the fifth turn.
● Fixed an issue where the Astral Reign Relic "Easter Moment" failed to trigger the Aliemus gain effect in certain situations where the current Aliemus was below the base Aliemus.
● Fixed an issue where the Aliemus gain Hint after Awakener "Thais" used Exalt "Ritual of Abundance" to Devour "Scion of Purity" was incorrectly displayed only once.
● Fixed an issue in the event "Rapture Express!" where a freeze could occur upon losing a battle.

[Event]
● Fixed an issue in the event "Phase Reversal" where Keepers who had previously obtained the avatar "My Turn: Cosmic Card" were unable to have it converted into a "Formless One's Invitation" upon obtaining it again. We sincerely apologize to the affected Keepers and will send the corresponding "Formless One's Invitation" via in-game mail as soon as possible.
● Fixed the issue in the "Vortice's Hoard" rules description of the gameplay event "Call of the Moskstraumen" where the description format for item names and quantities was not unified to the format of "Item Name" × Quantity.
● Fixed the issue in "The Invitation" event where, when viewing the "Invitation List," the information of invited Keepers was displayed incorrectly, and the "Argent Glow" rewards were erroneously shown as white icons.

[Compatibility]
● Fixed an issue in "Login" where, after clicking "Enter Game," login failure would occur in certain situations, causing the "Enter Game" button to disappear and preventing the player from logging in again.
● Fixed the issue where, when playing on iOS devices, the game would freeze or crash in certain situations.
● Fixed an issue where, when playing on PC, if the Keeper goes second, pressing the button to switch card display during the Rival's turn would incorrectly reveal the Rival's Hand information.

4. Localization
[English]
● Fixed spelling errors in certain Awakener Skill and Relic effect descriptions, as well as some Story text, under English language settings.

[Japanese]
● Fixed an issue where, under Japanese language settings, some Awakener Skill descriptions did not match the latest effects and displayed incorrect values.
● Fixed an issue where the names of Awakeners "Xu," "Vortice," and "Mouchette" were displayed incorrectly in certain interfaces under Japanese language settings.
● Special thanks to volunteer translator Alza for their Japanese translation optimization work! Thanks to this effort, in the current update, the Japanese translations of the story in "Investigation" Astral Reign Chapter 1, "Special Ops: The Color of Blood", "Special Ops: Rose's Abode", and "Dreamscape: Beyond the Skies: Part I", as well as multiple features including "Skills", "Supplies", "Relics", "Stages", "Resonance", "Events", and "Awakeners", totaling 2,436 lines of text, have been optimized.

[Korean]
● Thanks to volunteer translators BlackCatNero and LavenderJuly for their Korean translation optimization work! As a result of their efforts, in this update, the Korean translations of a total of 5,047 lines of text have been optimized across the various chapters of "Investigation," as well as the Story content of "Special Ops," "Psyche Deepdive," "Dreamscape World," and "Multidimensional Connection," along with multiple features including "Skills," "Supplies," and "Handbook."
真的假的

「每 5 次唤醒最多获取 2 次 SSR 物品」限制移除
真滴假的，之前被噴個半死都不改，怎麼突然改了？？？
活動延期可以理解，但為什麼復刻的也不一樣了
在預告裡面不是有刺的那位嗎？
旺達地瓜是下周，不衝突
所以是順便預告再下一個復刻嗎？

embeds.description:
From Chinese (Simplified) (ZH_HANS) To English (EN)
> Silver Core ×1

From Chinese (Simplified) (ZH_HANS) To English (EN)
> "Get up to 2 SSR items every 5 wakes" limit removal
> It's all true and false. It was changed by several people who were half dead before, so why did it suddenly change???
